panels.title: Response latency p50 / p95 / p99 (target 1200 ms)
panels.description: User-perceived end-of-speech to first-audio gap (spec §7). Target: p95 <= 1200 ms.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
  percentile_cont(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY response_latency_ms) AS "p50",
  percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY response_latency_ms) AS "p95",
  percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY response_latency_ms) AS "p99"
FROM turn_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND response_latency_ms IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Per-stage p95 (STT duration / LLM ttft / TTS ttfb)
panels.description: Per-stage p95; percentile_cont ignores NULL samples, so each line reflects only turns that recorded that stage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
  percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY stt_duration_ms) AS "STT p95",
  percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY llm_ttft_ms)    AS "LLM ttft p95",
  percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tts_ttfb_ms)    AS "TTS ttfb p95"
FROM turn_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT response_latency_ms
FROM turn_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND response_latency_ms IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Worst calls by response latency (top 20)
panels.description: Drill target: copy call_id into the call record. No PHI (id only).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT tm.call_id::text AS call_id,
  MAX(tm.response_latency_ms) AS worst_turn_ms,
  percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tm.response_latency_ms) AS p95_ms,
  COUNT(*) AS turns
FROM turn_metrics tm
WHERE $__timeFilter(tm.created_at) AND tm.response_latency_ms IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY tm.call_id
ORDER BY worst_turn_ms DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20
